core_principles: Fusion: Swiss Grid precision meets Acid Graphics chaos.
Emotion: Every interaction must feel 'wet' (fluid animations) or 'sharp' (instant feedback).
Content: User content is the hero; UI is the stage. Use varying aspect ratios.
Depth: Heavy use of layered glassmorphism and grain to create tactile digital surfaces.
anti_patterns: No default Shadcn cards (must be customized).

usage_rules.h1: font-heading font-extrabold text-5xl md:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none uppercase
usage_rules.caption: font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest opacity-60

rules: Sidebar: col-span-3 (sticky). Feed: col-span-6. Right-panel: col-span-3.
Mobile: Single column, bottom navigation bar.
Asymmetry: Avoid perfect 50/50 splits. Use 60/40 or 70/30.

cards.glass: bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 shadow-lg rounded-3xl
cards.solid: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border shadow-sm rounded-2xl

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-border focus:border-primary rounded-none px-0 py-4 focus:ring-0 transition-colors text-lg placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

visual_enhancers.texture: Overlay a fixed 'noise' texture on the body (opacity 0.03) to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Use 'conic-gradient' for borders or loading states.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Colored shadows matching the element's hue (e.g., purple button = purple glow).

auth.card: m-auto w-full max-w-md bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/20 p-8 rounded-3xl shadow-2xl

feed.post_container: mb-8 bg-card rounded-3xl overflow-hidden border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

chat.bubble_me: bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 max-w-[80%]
chat.bubble_them: bg-muted text-foreground rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-4 max-w-[80%]

call_interface.overlay: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/90 flex flex-col items-center justify-center
call_interface.video_pip: absolute top-4 right-4 w-32 h-48 bg-gray-800 rounded-xl border-2 border-white/20 shadow-2xl object-cover
call_interface.controls: absolute bottom-8 flex gap-6 p-4 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-full border border-white/10

accessibility_checklist: Ensure contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for normal text.
Focus rings must be visible (use ring-offset-2).
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE tailwind.config.js first to include new fonts and colors.
3. CREATE the global CSS variables in index.css matching the 'Kinetic Flux' theme.
4. BUILD reusable 'GlassCard' and 'GradientButton' components before starting pages.
5. USE the provided image URLs for seeding the database or initial static props.
6. ENSURE the layout is responsive: Mobile Bottom Nav -> Desktop Sidebar.
7. IMPLEMENT 'Settings' with Theme Toggle using the 'next-themes' or custom context logic provided in shadcn.
8. For WebRTC, design the call interface to be floating or full-screen modal, not inline.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text (accessibility nightmare).
Avoid 'lorem ipsum' where possible; use realistic placeholder text.
All avatars must be 'object-cover' to prevent stretching.
Use 'gap-6' or 'gap-8' for feed items to allow breathing room.
Add 'active:scale-95' to all interactive elements for tactile feel.
